achievements.description: Finish Skidda's Row while holding right at all times and without using the checkpoint barrel

achievements.description: Defeat Belcha without being harmed

achievements.description: Enter the second Bonus Room in Barrel Shield Bust-Up using only Kiddy - the Team Up ability is not allowed

achievements.description: Beat Brash's record on Riverside Race after completing both Bonus Rooms and without using the checkpoint barrel

achievements.description: Defeat Arich without being harmed

achievements.title: KAOS Aerial Assault
achievements.description: Hit KAOS 3 times in a row and without ever touching the ground until his helmet is fully removed

achievements.description: Defeat KAOS without being harmed

achievements.title: Ropeless Kreeping
achievements.description: Finish Kreeping Klasps without using any ropes and without using the checkpoint barrel

achievements.title: Turquoise Tidbit Triumph
achievements.description: Finish Fish Food Frenzy without letting Nibbla turn any color other than blue and without using the checkpoint barrel

achievements.title: Squirt Squasher
achievements.description: Defeat Squirt in 3 cycles

achievements.title: Quick Record Keepers
achievements.description: Complete Krevice Kreepers in less than 1 minute and 20 seconds

achievements.title: Arachnid Abstinence
achievements.description: Finish Krack-Shot Kroc without ever pressing the Y button and without using the checkpoint barrel

achievements.title: Staying Frosty
achievements.description: Defeat Bleak without being harmed
achievements.author: Brian

achievements.title: Mostly Peaceful Ocean Journey
achievements.description: Complete Floodlit Fish without defeating any Kocos or Lurchins and without using the checkpoint barrel
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Feathery Fellowship Forfeit
achievements.description: Complete Pot Hole Panic without riding any animal buddies and without using the checkpoint barrel
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Trypanophobic
achievements.description: Defeat Barbos without being harmed
achievements.author: Brian

achievements.title: Shockproof Scout
achievements.description: Complete Lightning Look-Out without being electrocuted and without using the checkpoint barrel
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Banana-Konservative Klamber
achievements.description: Finish Koindozer Klamber after obtaining 9 or less visible bananas and without using the checkpoint barrel

achievements.title: It Lives!
achievements.description: Defeat KAOS and Baron K. Roolenstein without being harmed

achievements.title: Gravity-Defying Bonus
achievements.description: Enter and complete the first Bonus Room in Criss Kross Cliffs without pressing B

achievements.title: Kiddy's Twin Triumph
achievements.description: Complete Tyrant Twin Tussle using only Kiddy and without using the checkpoint barrel

achievements.title: Twenty Thousand Leagues from Harm
achievements.description: Defeat Baron K. Roolenstein in the Knautilus without being harmed

achievements.title: Kritical Klock
achievements.description: Defeat Baron K. Roolenstein in Kaos Kore in less than two hours of in-game time after the start of the game; saving is allowed
achievements.author: Brian
